messages.author: Iceman
messages.text: Hello there, is anyone on the mesh in the NYC Queens area? The Meshtastic network is developed but is poorly managed. Thinking of switching all my nodes and building a repeater for MeshCore
messages.content_html: Hello there, is anyone on the mesh in the NYC Queens area? The Meshtastic network is developed but is poorly managed. Thinking of switching all my nodes and building a repeater for MeshCore

messages.author: Uncle Lit
messages.text: the meshcore dev team have moved to a new discord server. details and reasons are here: https://blog.meshcore.io/2026/04/23/the-split Please create a new thread for your region in the https://discord.com/channels/1495203904898728149/1495412453150818585 for your region on the new meshcore.io discord server. https://meshcore.gg
